2604.23801.title: Domain Fine-Tuning vs. Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Medical Multiple-Choice Question Answering: A Controlled Comparison at the 4B-Parameter Scale
2604.23801.paper_summary: Practitioners deploying small open-weight large language models (LLMs) for medical question answering face a recurring design choice: invest in a domain-fine-tuned model, or keep a general-purpose model and inject domain knowledge at inference time via retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). We isolate this trade-off by holding model size, prompt template, decoding temperature, retrieval pipeline, and evaluation protocol fixed, and varying only (i) whether the model has been domain-adapted (Gemma 3 4B vs. MedGemma 4B, both 4-bit quantized and served via Ollama) and (ii) whether retrieved passages from a medical knowledge corpus are inserted into the prompt. We evaluate all four cells of this 2x2 design on the full MedQA-USMLE 4-option test split (1,273 questions) with three repetitions per question (15,276 LLM calls). Domain fine-tuning yields a +6.8 percentage-point gain in majority-vote accuracy over the general 4B baseline (53.3% vs. 46.4%, McNemar p < 10^-4). RAG over MedMCQA explanations does not produce a statistically significant gain in either model, and in the domain-tuned model the point estimate is slightly negative (-1.9 pp, p = 0.16). At this scale and on this benchmark, domain knowledge encoded in weights dominates domain knowledge supplied in context. We release the full experiment code and JSONL traces to support replication.
2604.23801.paper_summary_zh: 從事小型開放權重大型語言模型（LLMs）用於醫學問題回答的實踐者面臨一個反覆出現的設計選擇：投資於一個領域微調的模型，還是保留一個通用模型並在推理時通過檢索增強生成（RAG）注入領域知識。<lb/>我們通過固定模型大小、提示模板、解碼溫度、檢索管道和評估協議，並僅變化（i）模型是否經過領域適應（Gemma 3 4B 與 MedGemma 4B，均為 4 位元量化並通過 Ollama 提供服務）以及（ii）是否將來自醫學知識語料庫的檢索段落插入提示中，來隔離這一權衡。<lb/>我們在完整的 MedQA-USMLE 4 選項測試拆分（1,273 個問題）上評估這個 2x2 設計的四個單元，每個問題重複三次（15,276 次 LLM 調用）。<lb/>領域微調相對於一般的 4B 基線（53.3% 對 46.4%，McNemar p < 10^-4）帶來了 +6.8 個百分點的多數投票準確率增益。<lb/>在兩個模型中，對 MedMCQA 解釋的 RAG 並未產生統計上顯著的增益，而在領域微調的模型中，點估計略為負值（-1.9 pp，p = 0.16）。<lb/>在這個規模和這個基準下，編碼在權重中的領域知識主導了在上下文中提供的領域知識。<lb/>我們發布完整的實驗代碼和 JSONL 跟蹤，以支持重複實驗。
2604.23801.author: Avi-ad Avraam Buskila et.al.
